actions.name: Changelog for all
actions.description: Generates a changelog for the Armbian project by loading source JSON, extracting commit information, and formatting it into an HTML report. It retrieves changes from specified branches, processes them, and uploads the results as artifacts. Finally, it creates a GitHub release with the generated changelog content.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 0:00, on MON

actions.name: Clean repository
actions.description: Cleans the repository by generating a JSON configuration based on supported releases and desktop environments from the Armbian build framework. It checks out the framework repository and processes configuration files to create a structured JSON output for further use in the workflow.

actions.name: Build All Stable Artifacts (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds and prepares stable artifacts and images for various boards and maintainers, including version management and artifact uploads. Generates JSON matrices for artifact and image chunks, and performs security checks on team membership. Supports nightly builds and allows for customization through various input parameters.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 1:00

actions.name: Build All Artifacts (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds and prepares artifacts and images for multiple targets, including version management and team checks. Generates JSON matrices for artifacts and images, manages user patches, and uploads results as artifacts. Handles nightly and stable builds based on input parameters.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 8 hours

actions.name: Build Apps Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds application images and manages versioning for multiple hardware boards. It checks team membership, bumps versions if necessary, and uploads artifacts for stable or nightly releases. The workflow also prepares a JSON matrix for further processing of artifacts and images.

actions.name: Build Community Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds community images and manages versioning for Armbian projects. Prepares artifacts and images based on specified parameters, including nightly or stable builds. Handles version bumping, artifact uploads, and generates release notes for GitHub releases.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 9:00, on THU

actions.name: Build Nightly Images (cronjob)
actions.description: Builds nightly images and manages versioning for releases. Prepares artifacts and uploads them for download while allowing for optional checks and parameters. Generates release notes and manages multiple build configurations based on user inputs.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 8:00

actions.name: Build Standard Support Images (admin)
actions.description: Builds standard support images for various boards, managing versioning and artifact generation. Prepares JSON matrices for image and artifact builds while allowing for customization through input parameters. Includes security checks and version bumping as part of the process.

actions.name: Build One by One (anyone)
actions.description: Builds Armbian images for various boards and configurations based on user inputs. Allows selection of target type, kernel branch, userspace, user interface, version, and specific board. Utilizes the armbian/build action to perform the build process and generate virtual images.

actions.name: Delete Old Releases
actions.description: Deletes old releases from the repository by identifying and removing both full and pre-releases that exceed a specified limit. It processes releases based on their creation date and removes the oldest ones, ensuring only the most recent releases are retained.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, at 3:00

actions.name: Download update (admin)
actions.description: Downloads updates from a specified source and synchronizes them to designated servers. Checks membership for authorization, retrieves server details, and performs file synchronization using rsync. Optionally purges incoming files based on user input and refreshes web and redirector indices after synchronization.

actions.name: Enable Hetzner Runners (admin)
actions.description: Enables and disables Hetzner cloud runners based on specified configurations, including machine type and count. Cleans up any existing dangling runners before enabling new ones, and allows for a configurable sleep period between enabling and disabling the runners. Checks team membership before proceeding with operations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 10 minutes past the hour, at 8:00

actions.name: Verify installation (pull request)
actions.description: Verifies installation by downloading and testing external configuration files. Cancels any currently active workflows to ensure only the latest is processed. Utilizes external scripts for the download and test operations, leveraging specific secrets for secure access.
actions.execution_method: pull_request (opened, reopened, edited, synchronize, review_requested), workflow_dispatch

actions.name: Full distro test builds
actions.description: Builds and tests full distribution images for Armbian by checking out necessary repositories, installing SSH keys, and compiling images based on specified desktop environments. It generates a JSON output containing supported releases and desktops, and executes builds in a matrix strategy for parallel processing. The workflow also includes steps for cleaning runners and logging into the GitHub Container Registry.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Labeler (pull request)
actions.description: Adds labels to pull requests based on modified files to facilitate organization and triage. Utilizes the 'actions/labeler' action to determine which labels to apply according to the defined rules.

actions.name: Set PR and issues labels from yaml
actions.description: Sets labels for pull requests and issues based on a YAML configuration file. It reads label definitions from '.github/labels.yml' and applies them accordingly, with a dry-run option for pull requests. The process ensures that labels are consistently applied based on the specified criteria in the YAML file.
actions.execution_method: workflow_dispatch, push to main branch, pull_request

actions.name: Upload live patch script
actions.description: Uploads live patch scripts by checking team membership, signing the scripts with GPG, and transferring them to a remote server. It ensures that only authorized team members can perform these actions and that the scripts are securely signed before upload. The process includes creating web-friendly versions of the scripts and using rsync for efficient file transfer.

actions.name: Recreate Matrix (push)
actions.description: Recreates action for building stable images by checking out necessary repositories, syncing user patches, generating build lists, and creating action scripts for various Armbian targets. It automates the preparation of YAML configurations for different build scenarios, ensuring that the latest configurations are used for building images. The process includes generating lists of supported boards and maintainers, and creating multiple YAML files for different release types.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: Redirector update (cronjob)
actions.description: Checks and validates various mirror servers for debs-beta, debs, archive, and images, and generates corresponding YAML configurations for a redirector. It retrieves data from a database, performs checks against the servers, and uploads the results. Additionally, it cleans up and prepares the necessary YAML files for deployment.
actions.cron_schedule: at 00 minutes past the hour, at 8:00

actions.name: Repository Index sync (auto)
actions.description: Synchronizes files across stable servers and updates the web index for a repository. Retrieves primary mirror details from a database and conditionally syncs files based on their last modified date or a forced sync input. Utilizes SSH for secure file transfer and manages multiple servers in parallel.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 4 hours

actions.name: Repository update (admin)
actions.description: Updates repository contents by downloading external packages, building them, and syncing to servers. Cleans up older packages, optionally includes partial updates, and manages SSH keys for secure file transfers. Finally, refreshes web and redirector indices after syncing.

actions.name: Smoke tests (cronjob)
actions.description: Runs various tests with the latest nightly codebase on real hardware, ensuring the integrity and performance of the software. It checks team membership before executing the smoke tests to validate the codebase under specified conditions.
actions.execution_method: schedule, workflow_dispatch with inputs (gitbranch, powermanagement, betaonly), repository_dispatch
actions.cron_schedule: at 30 minutes past the hour, at 5:00

actions.name: TEST TEST TEST
actions.description: Runs scheduled and manual tests, allowing for additional parameters and repository references. Prepares incoming data for deployment by mirroring to a CDN. Utilizes environment variables for repository management and build configurations.
actions.cron_schedule: at 0 minutes past the hour, every 8 hours

actions.name: Watchdog (cronjob)
actions.description: Reruns failed jobs for specified scripts in a GitHub repository by checking the status of previous workflow runs. It attempts to restart workflows up to six times if they fail or are cancelled. This process ensures that builds and tests are consistently executed, improving reliability and stability of the CI/CD pipeline.

actions.name: Generate Download Index in JSON (admin)
actions.description: Generates a JSON index of downloadable files and updates torrent files for Armbian. Checks team membership, installs dependencies, and retrieves stable files before creating a structured JSON file with metadata. Uploads the generated index and associated artifacts to a specified server location.
